lines.speaker: Spang
lines.text: I hate this job. All the other staff are so happy all the time. It depresses me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why don't you get a new job?

lines.speaker: Spang
lines.text: I can't find any other work. I wanted to be a Gnomeball player but I wasn't big enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's a shame. I'd better let you get on with your work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aren't you going to wish me a nice day?

lines.speaker: Spang
lines.text: Have a day. It can be nice if you can be bothered. I know I can't.
